message: Thanks for the feedback! We are routing this to the appropriate team for follow-up. cc @harsimar @mattsains-msft @rajkumar-rangaraj @xiang17

body:
## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage

Thank you for your feedback. Tagging and routing to the team member best able to assist.

**Summary:** You're asking whether it's safe to use the individual Azure Monitor exporter extension methods (`AddAzureMonitorTraceExporter`, `AddAzureMonitorMetricExporter`, `AddAzureMonitorLogExporter`) directly instead of the convenience method `UseAzureMonitorExporter`, while keeping your existing OTel configuration (custom samplers, selective instrumentation, etc.).

<details>
<summary>📋 Issue Analysis</summary>

**Core question:** Does bypassing `UseAzureMonitorExporter` risk missing important SDK-level behaviors such as duplicate data, missing Azure SDK HTTP instrumentation, or other side effects?

**What `UseAzureMonitorExporter` typically does beyond wiring exporters:**
- Registers Azure SDK Activity source instrumentation automatically
- Configures live metrics sampling/enrichment
- May set up enrichers or processors specific to Azure Monitor

**Considerations:**
- Using the individual `AddAzureMonitor*Exporter` methods should be safe for export, but you may need to manually add `AddAzureClientActivity()` (or equivalent) to capture telemetry from Azure SDK calls
- Custom samplers set via `SetSampler` work independently of exporters — this should be fine
- The `EnableLiveMetrics` / `DisableOfflineStorage` options are per-exporter config and should work the same way

**Suggested investigation:**
- Review the source of [`UseAzureMonitorExporter`](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/tree/main/sdk/monitor/Azure.Monitor.OpenTelemetry.AspNetCore) to see what additional registrations it performs beyond adding exporters
- Look for any `AddAzureMonitorActivitySource` or similar calls in that method

</details>

<details>
<summary>🔍 Label Selection</summary>

- **Category:** `Client` — this is a question about SDK behavior and usage patterns
- **Service:** `Monitor - Distro` — maps to the `Azure.Monitor.OpenTelemetry.AspNetCore` package in `/sdk/monitor/`
- Confidence: **High** — the package name is explicitly stated in the issue

</details>

<details>
<summary>📚 Potentially Helpful Resources</summary>

- [Azure Monitor OpenTelemetry AspNetCore source](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/tree/main/sdk/monitor/Azure.Monitor.OpenTelemetry.AspNetCore)
- [Azure Monitor OpenTelemetry Exporter](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/tree/main/sdk/monitor/Azure.Monitor.OpenTelemetry.Exporter)
- [OpenTelemetry .NET docs on custom sampling](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/languages/net/sampling/)

</details>
